text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond isn't able to win. Exhausted
toward the end of the race, her legs grow heavy.
She manages to finish, but finds the results
shameful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't have enough energy for the race
because she had to run to the racecourse after we
got stuck in traffic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond suspects everything was due to
her family jinx.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she picks herself up and declares her intent
to break her family's jinx at the upcoming
Japanese Derby.
